player.name: Riven Ashguard
notes: Veteran's kit: +1 to Athletics and Intimidation checks.
A brutal shield-line veteran built to absorb pressure and keep swinging in the thick of a fight.
Preset build: optimized for faster testing and quick starts.

companions.name: Elira Dawnmantle
notes: Healer's satchel: +1 to Medicine and Religion checks.
A Lantern priestess tending the frontier faithful in Iron Hollow.
A priestess of the Lantern whose compassion is sharpened, not softened, by the frontier's cruelty.
lore: Elira learned battlefield triage from roadside shrines that treated lumber crews, miners, and pilgrims with equal urgency.
She believes luck is not random mercy but a chance people build for one another with courage and timing.
Under stress she gets quieter, not colder, as though she is measuring every word for whether it heals or harms.

clues: A stolen dispatch confirms the attacks around Iron Hollow are organized enough to rattle Greywake's quartermasters.
Greywake's intake board sorted travelers into outcomes before their wagons reached the yard.
The Greywake manifest pre-sorted travelers by expected wound, delay, and loss before their wagons arrived.
Mira identifies Greywake's outcome-marked manifest as proof someone is pre-sorting road casualties.
Mira marks the switchback, likely scout perches, and the rough spacing the gang prefers when collapsing on a wagon.
Sabra has a Greywake manifest showing one caravan marked delayed before departure, which means somebody north of the Emberway is prewriting losses.
journal: Your soldier's opening leaves you with a live look at how hard Greywake is leaning on thin patrol lines and tired veterans to protect the road south.
Word reaches you that Mira Thann is quietly gathering capable hands in Greywake against Ashen Brand pressure around Iron Hollow.
Reward from South Barracks Breakout: 50 XP, 8 gold.
Reward from holding the barracks line: 15 XP, 6 gold.

notes: Sabra is not asking you to stop the whole network tonight. She just wants one clean manifest lie pinned to the wall before it can keep pretending it is routine paperwork.
Sabra wants the contract house's three cleanest tells cross-checked before the forged manifest line reaches the Emberway.
